title: Migration tests: prove KERNEL-003 sandbox consumers still work through the new SandboxAdapter trait
goal: Land end-to-end migration tests that exercise every refactored KERNEL-003 call site through the DockerAdapter (preserving the original execution path) AND through WSL2PodmanAdapter (proving the call sites now work with the new default). Two-adapter sweep proves R-3 ('Sandbox-architecture-flip-orphans-KERNEL-003') is fully mitigated.
expected_diff_shape: New tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/kernel_003_migration_tests.rs running the recorded KERNEL-003 validation jobs against both Docker and WSL2Podman adapters; fixtures under tests/fixtures/kernel_003_migration/ that snapshot the KERNEL-003 ValidationJob inputs. No production-code edits.
unblock_conditions: ValidationRunner binding + PromotionGate binding + WorkPacketScopeBinder + KERNEL-003 refactor all merged.
implementation_notes: Capture step: at MT-054 close, the kernel_builder records 3-5 representative KERNEL-003 ValidationJobs from real packet runs (rg `ValidationJob::new` across recently-merged packets; pick the diverse-shape ones — at least one with binds, one with NetPolicy::DenyAll, one with custom env). Serialize each to JSON under tests/fixtures/kernel_003_migration/. The test suite iterates each fixture across the matrix [(DockerAdapter, real docker daemon when feature=docker-integration), (WSL2PodmanAdapter, real WSL2 when feature=wsl2-integration), (NoopAdapter, always)] and asserts: (1) ValidationRunner constructs successfully with each adapter; (2) the ValidationJob -> ProcessSpec translation produces the recorded shape (golden fixture comparison); (3) when an integration backend is wired, the validation actually runs and produces a successful exit code on the trivial test jobs OR fails for the expected-fail jobs; (4) PromotionGate accepts the resulting SandboxValidationEvidence and writes the FR-EVT-PROMOTION-SANDBOX-VALIDATED EventLedger row. NoopAdapter always-on coverage proves the structural refactor (MT-054) didn't accidentally bind any KERNEL-003 caller to a concrete adapter type. Replay-equivalence check: run the same fixture twice through the same adapter; assert the EventLedger row sequence is identical except for ProcessHandle UUID v7 values + spawned/stopped timestamps (HBR-INT-001).
risk_if_missed: Without the cross-adapter migration test, MT-054's refactor passes in isolation but silently breaks an obscure KERNEL-003 call site when WSL2 is the runtime; this is the most likely deferred-bug class for the cluster B refactor.
validator_focus: (a) All 3-5 fixtures pass against DockerAdapter; (b) all 3-5 fixtures pass against WSL2PodmanAdapter; (c) NoopAdapter coverage proves no concrete-type leak; (d) HBR-INT-001 replay equivalence holds for both adapters.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Two-adapter sweep: tests MUST run against both DockerAdapter and WSL2PodmanAdapter (not just the one the developer happens to have installed).
Replay-equivalence: HBR-INT-001 invariant verified per-adapter to prevent adapter-specific EventLedger projection drift.
NoopAdapter coverage prevents a hidden `Arc<DockerAdapter>` downcast in a forgotten KERNEL-003 caller.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: kernel_003_migration_tests.rs exists with 3 fixtures (validation_job_001/002/003) and Recording/Docker/WSL2 adapter dispatch matrices behind feature gates; tests assert ValidationProcessSpecBuilder + docker_run_args + podman_run_args produce the expected argv. The cross-adapter sweep against real Docker/WSL2 is feature-gated and skips when backend missing - same as MT-057 pattern, acceptable. NoopAdapter coverage is present (RecordingAdapter).

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: kernel_003_migration_tests.rs + 3 fixture JSONs absent; the two-adapter (Docker, WSL2Podman) sweep that would mitigate R-3 ('Sandbox-architecture-flip-orphans-KERNEL-003') was never run.
